narrative:
Symmes Twp. township has 11,479 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.1 percentage points.
